title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on personal computers and automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and applications. It supports workflows like file organization, Gmail integration, and event scheduling on Pro and Max subscription tiers.
